misc: Known for deliberating his next shot for a long time, leading to somewhat slow play
biography: Panu is a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, known for his strategic mind and meticulous approach to the game. While the identity of his home club remains a mystery, his presence on the course is anything but. He is known for carefully considering each shot, sometimes leading to a more deliberate pace of play.

Across three appearances, Panu has demonstrated a keen understanding of the tournament's unique challenges. His singular victory in the Hector Trophée stands as a testament to his ability to perform under pressure. While the coveted Victor Trophy has eluded him thus far, Panu's competitive spirit remains undeterred.

Although considered as retired from Hector events, Panu's contributions to the tournament are not forgotten. Although he is not anticipated to participate in Hector Trophée 2026, golf enthusiasts will remember Panu's tenure in the sport.
